title: mespilus affinis
intro: Mespilus affinis, also known as Chinese medlar, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China, belonging to the family Rosaceae. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Mespilus affinis is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and aiding in digestion. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant's fruits, leaves, and roots can be used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, although further research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy.
